MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,019.27 FILED BY ALPER DIANE, PRESIDENT ALPER AND ASSOCIATES PERSONNEL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUSK ROBERT, ESQ. LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT A. SUSK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
